content.en:
The young man looked at Ye Tian in disbelief, not knowing what words to use to express his shock and surprise.

How difficult is the third level of assessment of the difficult assessment, since so many cosmic eras, one person has passed the third level of assessment.

This is an assessment set according to the highest standards, but I didn't expect Ye Tian to pass the third level of difficult assessment and complete an unprecedented achievement!

"Congratulations!"

Youth Road.

"Senior, I have passed the third level of assessment, can the senior answer the previous question?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Okay, I'll tell you!" the young man said: "This world and the inheritance assessment were all created by me, but I am just a wisp of soul power, and I can only hide here, I can't enter the universe, otherwise I will be discovered by the origin of the universe." Even if you are a detached person, you can't compete with the origin of the universe, let alone a wisp of my soul. Only in this place, even if the Universe Origin Rules spread to this world now, it is relatively weak, and there is no way to help me. However, after a long period of evolution, my soul is basically independent, but I can't really become an independent entity, so I can only combine it with the place of inheritance assessment and guard here!"

"Senpai is really a detached person?"

Although Ye Tian had some guesses, he was still quite surprised to get the young man's answer.

"Yes, I'm a detachment. However, as far as I know, I am the only one who has been detached from the universe for many epochs! Unfortunately, even if I become a detached person, it is difficult to change certain things!"

At the thought of this, the young man showed a slight sense of sadness.

"Senior, what's going on outside the universe?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"I don't know!" said the young man, "I'm just a wisp of soul, and I can't know what is happening in my body, but my body can know what is going on here." So, you ask me this question, I can't answer it!"

Ye Tian knew it, so he didn't ask this question anymore.

In the ensuing conversation, Ye Tian also knew the name of the young man.

Yuntan Tianjun!

Next is the most important reward link, Ye Tian is also very much looking forward to what kind of reward Yuntan Tianjun will give him.

The reward of a detached person must be precious.

"Ye Tian, there are not many things left behind by the ontology, and if you have passed the third level of the difficult assessment, you can get the most precious inheritance left by the ontology, that is, a set of tactics created by the ontology for countless billions of years!"

Yuntan Tianjun Road.

"Tactics?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"Yes, it is a combat method specially used for combat, called Tiangang combat method, which can mobilize the potential of the physical body to fight, but does not consume potential. For example, if your physical strength is 1, you can only burst out with 1 combat power if you try your best, but if you use the Tiangang Battle Method, you can burst out with 5 or even 10 explosive power. There are a total of nine types of Tiangang combat methods, if you pass the first layer of difficult assessments, you can obtain the first type of Tiangang combat methods, also known as Tiangang one style, which can burst out of Gang Qi and integrate into their own strength, and can also be used to perform moves. "

Yuntan Tianjun Road.

"Tiangang's battle method can greatly increase the combat power, no wonder the combat power of the first god lord of the god race and the first demon lord of the demon race is so terrifying, completely crushing the other supremes, called the strongest supreme!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Soon, Yuntan Tianjun took out a inheritance ball.

"This is the inheritance ball of the complete Tiangang battle method, you can accept the inheritance, but you can't pass it on to others. The Tiangang Battle Method created by the ontology is not something that anyone can cultivate, so naturally it is not allowed to spread widely. When you accept the lineage, you must make a vow. "

Yuntan Tianjun Road.

"Good!"

Ye Tianying said.

Immediately, he made an oath, and only then began to accept the inheritance of Tiangang's battle method.

Rumble!!!!

Countless pieces of information poured into Ye Tian's soul, and the contents of the first to ninth forms of Tiangang's battle method completely entered Ye Tian's mind and were absorbed by the immortal soul.

While accepting the inheritance, Ye Tian checked the content of Tiangang's battle method.

"The mysterious Tiangang method of battle is worthy of the secret technique created by the transcendent, it is simply beyond the current cultivation system, although it is not as good as the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique, but the two are two directions, the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique is to break the limit of the physical body and enhance the potential of the physical body, while the Tiangang Battle Law is to fully develop the potential and form a battle, but after the secret technique is cast, all the potential returns to the body. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

In short, such a secret technique as the Tiangang Battle Method, even if countless supreme beings in the entire universe were united, there was no way to create it, which was beyond their comprehension.

Moreover, the supremes of this universe today do not have a high physical strength, and they don't know much about physical bodies at all.

Ye Tian's physical body is stronger and more terrifying, the Tiangang battle method is more suitable for him, once the Tiangang battle method is cast, his combat power will inevitably skyrocket many times.

It was precisely because Ye Tian had not cultivated a secret technique such as the Tiangang Battle Technique, but he had passed the third-level assessment, that Yuntan Tianjun would be so shocked.

If Ye Tian cultivated the Tiangang Battle Method, then the combat power would be even more terrifying, reaching a level that he couldn't even understand.

After Ye Tian accepted the inheritance, Yuntan Tianjun said: "The inheritance of Tiangang's battle method is only one of the rewards, and there is another reward for you!"

As he spoke, Yuntan Tianjun took out a small piece of golden fragment and handed it to Ye Tiandao: "This is an origin fragment, the origin fragment of the universe I was in at the beginning. The ontology was a little arrogant, trying to compete with the origin of the universe, and entered the place where the origin of the universe was located, but unfortunately he was injured by the origin of the universe, so he had no choice but to escape here, created this world, and after leaving the inheritance, he escaped into chaos. Once you're in Chaos, it's hard to come back. And in the original battle, although the body was seriously injured, it also took away a trace of the origin of the universe, which was the fragment in front of him. This is a true cosmic origin fragment, and even the supreme of your world cannot imagine it. Of course, you can't bring this cosmic origin fragment into the main space of the universe, and the cosmic origin will retract this cosmic origin. You can refine this trace of cosmic origin here, and the benefits to you are very great, you will complete the observation of all the laws of the universe, and you will make rapid progress in cultivation in the future, and even creating various secret techniques and moves will be many times easier. It can even be said that there is no limit to your comprehension of any supernatural powers, and you no longer need Heavenly Dao Texts, because you are equivalent to refining countless Heavenly Dao Texts. Do you know the value of this cosmic origin fragment?"

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian was instantly excited, staring at this piece of cosmic origin fragment incredibly.

Although the power of the Universe Origin often comes, it is only an external force, and it is impossible for the Universe Origin to leave the Universe Origin Space, so there is no limit to wanting to obtain the Universe Origin Fragment, and only those who are transcendent have such terrifying strength and can snatch a trace of the Origin from the Universe Origin.

"Thank you Yuntan Tianjun!"

Ye Tian was very excited and thanked, and immediately took over this piece of cosmic origin fragment!
